title: Reschedule Booking Workflow
summary: Handles reschedule intent by updating status, notifying the client, and reassigning the record when needed.
businessOutcome: Reduce booking friction and keep ownership clear when appointments need to move.
thumbnail: Reschedule requests turn into a managed workflow instead of inbox chaos.
problem: Rescheduling can create confusion when status updates, contact communication, and ownership changes happen separately.
solution: This workflow coordinates the client message, record update, and reassignment steps so reschedules stay controlled end to end.
workflowOverview: Triggers on reschedule-worthy appointment status changes
audience: Scheduling teams, intake coordinators, service businesses
